Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Mental Examination Of Pltf,
Off Calendar Jun-22-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Steven Pabros, for Defendant/Moving party
Dennis Blum, for Plaintiff/Opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held. Defendants Julia Urruty, Vincent Urruty's Motion For Mental Examination Of Plaintiff is GRANTED. The report of the examination shall be provided to Plaintiff no later than two weeks after the examination. GRANTED with examination to commence at 10:00 AM. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2006 Set For Trial On Jul-31-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-13-06 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 606
